_comment: The weak-word list for the spec-format gate (SPEC INV-256), seeded from the ISO 29148 and INCOSE vague-term lists plus the project's own additions (FORMAT.md, comprehension-gate). A weak word opens a slot — a reference point, a measure, or a reason — that its criterion must fill where the word stands; a hit with no reference cue nearby and no [GAP] line reds. Each new term a cold reader catches (Area 5) joins this list.
_reference_cues_comment: A weak word is excused when its criterion carries one of these reference cues (a filled slot) or a [GAP] line. The set is deliberately generous — the machine excuses a plausibly-filled slot and leaves the close read to the panel.
